testsuite.name: com.telcoedge.charging.BalanceThroughPutBenchMark
testsuite.system-out: === Balance Deduction throughput Benchmark === Threads: 10 | ops/Thread: 100000 | Total: 1000000 -------------------------------------------------------- -------------------------------------------------------- Synchronized: 4,784,689 ops/sec (209 ms) Atomic: 4,587,156 ops/sec (218 ms) Lock: 6,410,256 ops/sec (156 ms) -------------------------------------------------------- CAS VS Synchonized: 1.0x slower synchronized wins Lock VS Synchonized: 1.3x faster Lock wins
